name: DashClaw
voice: Governance runtime that sits between an agent's intent and the real world. Serious, precise, trustworthy. Verbs: intercept, enforce, record, verify. No hype, no exclamation marks. Brand orange #f97316 is a SIGNAL, never decoration: the mark, a focused state, a primary CTA, attention required. Never a hero wash or ambient glow-spam. The accent 'profit' slot is the lighter brand orange #fb923c and is reserved for CTA text. Dark mode only. Not generic SaaS, not consumer-AI, not heavy-enterprise, not crypto/web3.
